description.value: Elite mounted warrior armed with spear, sword, or bow; likely from province with horsemanship tradition; serves as scout, courier, or assault force.

contacts.value: Legionaries, centurions, auxiliaries, horse breeders and trainers

coc7-cthulhu-invictus.specialNotes: Light Horseman variant rides agile mount, wears no armor, uses bow and scimitar. Heavy Horseman variant rides powerful mount, wears heavy armor, uses long spear and sword.
